findings.detail: GI served from KV-backed state (not mock). KV seed successful: GI_STATE, HEARTBEAT, LAST_INGEST, SIGNAL_SNAPSHOT.
ATLAS reported GI 0.74; independent integrity-status shows 0.68. Delta of -0.06 indicates slight staleness in ATLAS snapshot vs live computation.
Signal composite 0.658 from 40 instruments. GI 0.68 is consistent with composite given stability (0.3) and sentiment (0.3) drags.
All 11 ATLAS-flagged anomalies confirmed persistent. ZEUS found 2 additional silent agents (AUREA-µ4, ECHO-µ5) totaling 13 persistent anomalies across 12 unhealthy microservices.
All 10 KV keys present: SIGNAL_SNAPSHOT, GI_STATE, ECHO_STATE, ECHO_STATE_KV, TRIPWIRE_STATE, TRIPWIRE_STATE_KV, HEARTBEAT, LAST_INGEST, SYSTEM_PULSE, TRIPWIRE_STATE_REDIS.
No candidates pending verification. Pipeline clear.
10 micro-agents returning no signal. GDELT and Reddit returning zero results. Likely upstream API availability issues or rate-limiting.

recommendation: Operator should investigate 10 persistently silent micro-agents and zero-return feeds (GDELT, Reddit). GI drift between ATLAS and live is minor but should be tracked. No contested claims. System is degraded but honest.
